extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won stage 7 after MOHORIČ Matej's solo attack was neutralized, holding off VAN AVERMAET Greg in sprint.
tactical_patterns: MOHORIČ Matej bridged to break then immediately attacked solo rather than cooperating, forcing jersey defense from MATTHEWS.
KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren sacrificed GC leader role to chase for MATTHEWS sprint, revealing team prioritization hierarchy mid-race.
VAN BAARLE Dylan attempted podium challenge against MOHORIČ in final, showing team willing to attack GC position opportunistically.
Multiple attacks from MOHORIČ and KRAGH ANDERSEN inside final kilometers failed to crack MATTHEWS, confirming his superior finish strength.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: defended GC under sustained attacks then won sprint, showing rare combination of resilience and speed
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: bridged to break alone then immediately counter-attacked, demonstrating exceptional late-race aggression and strength
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: neutral: sacrificed GC leader position to chase for teammate, strong but unable to crack MATTHEWS defensively
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: marked MATTHEWS closely but lacked final kick, second place without being able to contest sprint
rider_signals.ŠTYBAR Zdeněk: neutral: present in final group for third but unable to challenge top two positions
